meaning: n.为密友写传记的人 为名人详细记述言行的人
examples: Boswell was the biograph er of Dr Johnson.
James Boswell admired Samuel Johnson's power of repartee.
"destroyed in a precipitate burning of his papers a few days before his death" (James Boswell).
Boswell's heirs destroyed a passage in his diary where he describes a fling he had with Rosseau's mistress.
Boswell that hits all the right notes for how an organization can create a viral campaign.
